title: Hoist canonical bootstrap content + marker constants to packages/shared
description: Create packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts exporting the locked rc.19 canonical bootstrap content as a `const BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL: string` plus marker constants. Resolves the cross-package gap: packages/server has zero dep on packages/cli, so canonical + markers MUST live in shared for both CLI install (writer) and server doctor (drift comparator) to consume from one source. Pattern mirrors rc.18 banner-i18n shared module.

files.change: Export `BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL` (verbatim the locked草案 text from task brief — Fabric Bootstrap heading + 行为规则 + 知识库(KB) sections), `BOOTSTRAP_MARKER_BEGIN = '<!-- fabric:bootstrap:begin -->'`, `BOOTSTRAP_MARKER_END = '<!-- fabric:bootstrap:end -->'`, `LEGACY_KB_MARKER_BEGIN = '<!-- fabric:knowledge-base:begin -->'`, `LEGACY_KB_MARKER_END = '<!-- fabric:knowledge-base:end -->'`, and a precompiled `BOOTSTRAP_REGEX` matching the new marker pair (non-greedy body, optional 2-leading-blank-lines, mirrors current FABRIC_SECTION_REGEX shape). Also export a `LEGACY_KB_REGEX` for one-time migration detection.
Re-export all from ./bootstrap-canonical.js (if barrel does not exist; otherwise append the re-export).
Add `export * from './templates/index.js';` so both `@fenglimg/fabric-shared` consumers (CLI + server) can import { BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL, BOOTSTRAP_MARKER_BEGIN, ... } directly.

implementation: Read the locked草案 content verbatim from task brief — preserve every character including the zh-CN-hybrid wording (canonical is fixed text per clarification decision 3, no `{{fabric_language}}` interpolation)
Create packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts with the BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL string export plus the 4 marker constants plus the 2 regex constants
Add packages/shared/src/templates/index.ts barrel (or extend existing) so consumers don't need deep imports
Wire into packages/shared/src/index.ts root barrel — verify no name collisions (BOOTSTRAP_* names are unique)
Build packages/shared (pnpm --filter=@fenglimg/fabric-shared build) and verify dist/templates/bootstrap-canonical.{js,d.ts} are emitted
Verify both packages/cli and packages/server can resolve the import via TypeScript (run pnpm typecheck on monorepo)

reference.pattern: rc.18 banner-i18n shared module — shared types/constants consumed by both CLI install paths and server runtime
reference.examples: Existing schema re-exports show the barrel pattern. Use ESM .js suffix in TS imports per packages/shared/tsconfig.json

criteria: File packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts exists and exports `BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL` as a non-empty string matching the locked草案 byte-for-byte
Exports `BOOTSTRAP_MARKER_BEGIN`, `BOOTSTRAP_MARKER_END`, `LEGACY_KB_MARKER_BEGIN`, `LEGACY_KB_MARKER_END` as exact HTML-comment string literals
Exports `BOOTSTRAP_REGEX` and `LEGACY_KB_REGEX` as RegExp instances that match `<marker_begin>[content]<marker_end>` with non-greedy body and optional 2-leading-blank-lines
`pnpm --filter=@fenglimg/fabric-shared build` succeeds with zero TS errors and emits dist/templates/bootstrap-canonical.{js,d.ts}
`pnpm typecheck` at monorepo root passes — both packages/cli and packages/server can resolve `from '@fenglimg/fabric-shared'` to the new exports
BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL string length ≥ 400 bytes (sanity bound — locked草案 has ~500 chars)

rationale.chosen_approach: TS const export in packages/shared. Both CLI install and server doctor import from one place via existing `@fenglimg/fabric-shared` workspace dep.
alternatives_considered: Keep templates as files in packages/cli/templates/ and bundle hash into shared at build time (option B from doctor-flow exploration)
Add workspace dep server → cli (option C, creates cyclic-feel given cli depends on server for runDoctor*)
rationale.tradeoffs: Content lives in TS (less human-friendly for non-devs to edit) vs file-on-disk template. Acceptable given pre-user clean-slate phase and short canonical body.

manual_checks: Verify dist artifact has expected named exports via `node -e "import('@fenglimg/fabric-shared').then(m => console.log(Object.keys(m).filter(k => k.startsWith('BOOTSTRAP_'))))"`
Verify the canonical content matches the locked草案 byte-for-byte (paste into a temporary file and diff)
success_metrics: Zero TS compilation errors across monorepo
Six exports present (1 canonical string + 4 marker literals + 2 regexes minimum)
Build artifact size < 5KB (templates module should be tiny)
unit: packages/shared/test/templates/bootstrap-canonical.test.ts — assert canonical contains '## 行为规则' AND '## 知识库(KB)' substrings

risks.description: Encoding drift — copy-paste of zh-CN text may introduce stray U+FEFF BOM or smart-quote chars vs the locked草案
risks.mitigation: Write canonical via Edit tool with the exact byte sequence from task brief. Add unit test asserting startsWith('# Fabric Bootstrap\n\n本项目').
